SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?university ?universityLabel ?foundingYear WHERE {
  VALUES ?university {
    wd:Q10985 wd:Q2903 wd:Q19230 wd:Q3414 wd:Q3205 wd:Q1578 wd:Q1506 wd:Q2243
  }
  ?university wdt:P571 ?foundingYear .
  ?university rdfs:label ?universityLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?universityLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY ?foundingYear
```
